assumptions: Synthetic deterministic static geometry with Nu=3 and Ns=10.
Synchronization is measured relative to the first satellite reference clock.
The reference satellite clock is excluded from the synchronization average.
Refined JCLS fuses repeated independent measurement epochs over a fixed static geometry.
